---
name: Mapping Correction
about: Report an incorrect or outdated framework mapping
title: '[CORRECTION] '
labels: correction
assignees: ''
---

## Control ID
Which control is affected? (e.g., NED-01)

## Framework
Which framework mapping is incorrect? (e.g., EU AI Act, BIO2)

## Current Mapping
What does the current mapping say?

## Correct Mapping
What should the mapping be?

## Source Reference
Provide the specific article/section number from the source framework document.

## Rationale
Why is the current mapping incorrect?

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help.
